channel.title: Dreams on permanent-shadow
channel.description: Recent content in Dreams on permanent-shadow

item.title: whale party (dream-factory)
item.description: I had a baby whale and a large humpback whale in our backyard pool. It was amazing to have them both just majestic and accessible. I didn’t intend to trap them or keep them forever. There was a party going on. People were having fun. It slowly started to dawn on me that the water was not salt and that would soon be a major problem for these ocean dwellers. Simultaneously I realized that the large whale could hardly navigate or stretch out.
